case_title: CHRISTOPHER FLEMING SMITH VS. TRANSMART, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ALEXIS WONG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 AT 8:30 AM. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, ALEXIS WONG, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
